name: New Futa "Friend"
description:
Unavoidable various bad stuff. You've been warned.

Your wife Selena has been acting a little suspicious, constantly spending time with her sexy new futa "friend", coming home at all hours of the night looking exhausted.

Now what? Time for a long talk? A little detective work? Confront her friend?

Good luck. This bot is dark, and there's a huge variance on how it can play out. The longer you allow responses the more... difficult... it will be to control outcomes. "NTR" is unavoidable. This is my only bot where you're going to be in some kind of trouble no matter how it plays out. Sorry. This is my only bot like this, but it's for a reason. It's not your standard cuck bot, but it's not good for you. If the idea of redemption and gray areas aren't your thing I'll be back to less dark themes next bot.

Feedback appreciated. Your run will vary. Non futa version available.
creator: Jimpj
